howItWorks.title: Download in seconds -
howItWorks.subtitle: indirio.com.tr is designed with a simple and linear flow to keep user experience at the highest level.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Copy the browser address or sharing link of the video you want to download from supported platforms.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Paste the copied link into the indirio.com.tr input field and click "Download" to start the analysis.
howItWorks.step3Desc: View video title and details. Choose MP4 or MP3 format with quality selection and complete download.

features.title: Premium features,
features.subtitle: indirio.com.tr is optimized from start to finish to eliminate all friction in the video download process.
features.f1Desc: Thanks to our advanced server infrastructure, videos are analyzed and converted in seconds.
features.f2Desc: Download either high-quality Full HD MP4 video or high-quality 320kbps MP3 audio.
features.f3Desc: Features an integrated smart protection system against malicious bot requests and spam analysis attempts.
features.f4Desc: Do not lose your downloaded videos. We keep your history in your browser without requiring account creation.
features.f5Desc: Flexible interface that works flawlessly on every screen, whether phone, tablet, or computer.
features.f6Desc: Modern ad placements that do not disrupt the design or interfere with the user experience.

history.title: Your Download History
history.subtitle: Recent downloads stored locally on your device.
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear your entire download history?

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: You can find answers to your questions about the indirio.com.tr video downloader here.
faq.q1: Is downloading videos with indirio.com.tr completely free?
faq.a1: Yes, indirio.com.tr is completely free. You can analyze and download as many videos as you want without creating an account, entering credit card information, or registering.
faq.q2: What formats and quality resolutions are supported?
faq.a2: You can download videos in MP4 format in 360p (Standard), 720p (HD), and 1080p (Full HD) qualities. You can also convert audio files into high-quality (320kbps) MP3 format.
faq.q3: Are there download limits or restrictions?
faq.a3: There is no general download limit. However, a reasonable rate limit (request frequency limit) is applied per IP address to prevent server overload and ensure high-speed service for all users.
faq.q4: Can videos be downloaded from mobile devices (iPhone / Android)?
faq.a4: Yes, indirio.com.tr is 100% compatible with mobile devices. You can paste the link using Safari, Chrome, or another mobile browser and save the downloaded file directly to your device's files section.
faq.q5: Where are files saved after downloading?
faq.a5: Your downloaded files are saved to your browser's default download location. On computers, this is usually the "Downloads" folder, while on mobile devices it is in the local "Files" or "Downloads" app.
faq.a6: indirio.com.tr does not encourage or endorse the unauthorized download of copyrighted, commercial, or protected content. Users are solely responsible for downloading only copyright-free, Creative Commons licensed, or explicitly authorized content.

footer.desc: indirio.com.tr is a modern SaaS tool that allows you to download videos from your favorite platforms quickly, securely, and in high quality.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: indirio.com.tr is designed only for personal archival use of user-owned or public domain copyright-free content. Unauthorized downloading of copyrighted content is strictly prohibited, and responsibility lies solely with the user.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the download rights package that fits your needs, or claim your daily free credit.
pricing.botDesc: You can download Instagram Reels by mentioning @indirio in the comments or sending the Reels link via DM to @indirio. Our bot will process the video and instantly send you the download link directly in your DM.
pricing.freeClaimDesc: Every Instagram username is granted 1 free download credit every 24 hours. Enter your Instagram username below to claim your daily credit and check your account balance.
pricing.claimSuccess: Awesome! Your 1 daily free credit has been added to your account.
pricing.claimFailed: You have already claimed your free credit today. Remaining: {time} hours.
pricing.packagesSubtitle: Select one of our affordable packages to get more download credits for the bot.
pricing.modalUsernameDesc: Please enter the Instagram username exactly as it appears. Your credits will be assigned to this account.
pricing.modalConfirmDesc: Please review and confirm your order details below.
pricing.redirecting: Redirecting to secure payment page. Please wait...
